title: Sad twist after motorist drove 100m off Chapman’s Peak cliff
description: NATIONAL NEWS - A person has died after a...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"NATIONAL NEWS - A person has died after a car plunged 100 metres down a cliff on Chapman’s Peak onto the rocks below.","html":"NATIONAL NEWS - A person has died after a car plunged 100 metres down a cliff on Chapman’s Peak onto the rocks below."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The car, which appears to be a VW Golf GTI, plunged off the seaside of the notorious Chapman’s Peak Drive, in the Western Cape.","html":"The car, which appears to be a VW Golf GTI, plunged off the seaside of the notorious Chapman’s Peak Drive, in the Western Cape."},{"type":"heading","text":"Cliff accident","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The incident took place on Sunday, just after 09:00, at the Noordhoek side of the peak. The road was temporarily closed, but reopened after a few hours.","html":"The incident took place on Sunday, just after 09:00, at the Noordhoek side of the peak. The road was temporarily closed, but reopened after a few hours."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Western Cape police spokesperson Captain FC van Wyk said Fish Hoek police initially registered a case of reckless and negligent driving following the accident on Chapman’s Peak Drive.","html":"Western Cape police spokesperson Captain FC van Wyk said Fish Hoek police initially registered a case of reckless and negligent driving following the accident on Chapman’s Peak Drive."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"“A 47-year-old person sustained serious injuries and was airlifted by helicopter to a nearby hospital for treatment. He later died in the hospital due to injuries sustained."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“This case was then changed to culpable homicide for further investigation. Circumstances surrounding this incident are under investigation,” Van Wyk said on Tuesday.","html":"“This case was then changed to culpable homicide for further investigation. Circumstances surrounding this incident are under investigation,” Van Wyk said on Tuesday."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Citizen reached out to Van Wyk for further clarity on the death, but he said no other details could be shared with the media, and the investigation is continuing.","html":"The Citizen reached out to Van Wyk for further clarity on the death, but he said no other details could be shared with the media, and the investigation is continuing."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“The individual who was driving is subject to police investigations”","html":"“The individual who was driving is subject to police investigations”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He said the change in charges is because police are establishing “where the person was sitting”.","html":"He said the change in charges is because police are establishing “where the person was sitting”."},{"type":"heading","text":"Chapmans Peak","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Chapman’s Peak has been the site of various accidents over the years.","html":"Chapman’s Peak has been the site of various accidents over the years."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In April 2021, a cyclist had a lucky escape when he was rescued after crashing and falling 30m off Chapman’s Peak Drive","html":"In April 2021, a cyclist had a lucky escape when he was rescued after crashing and falling 30m off Chapman’s Peak Drive"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Johan Marais, from Wilderness Search and Rescue (WSAR), said at the time that paramedics stabilised the cyclist after a rescue helicopter lifted him out and took him to a waiting ambulance.","html":"Johan Marais, from Wilderness Search and Rescue (WSAR), said at the time that paramedics stabilised the cyclist after a rescue helicopter lifted him out and took him to a waiting ambulance."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In March of the same year, a woman was killed, and the man she was travelling with was critically injured when their vehicle plunged 200 metres off Chapman’s Peak.","html":"In March of the same year, a woman was killed, and the man she was travelling with was critically injured when their vehicle plunged 200 metres off Chapman’s Peak."},{"type":"heading","text":"KZN scholar crash","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Meanwhile, at least nine schoolchildren have been injured in a school transport accident in KwaZulu-Natal (KZN).","html":"Meanwhile, at least nine schoolchildren have been injured in a school transport accident in KwaZulu-Natal (KZN)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It is understood that the accident occurred at about 3pm on Lena Ahrens Rd near Rhodes Avenue in the Glenwood area of Durban on Monday.","html":"It is understood that the accident occurred at about 3pm on Lena Ahrens Rd near Rhodes Avenue in the Glenwood area of Durban on Monday."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"ALS Paramedics spokesperson Garrith Jamieson said paramedics arrived on the scene to find that a Taxi carrying school kids home had T Boned a bakkie.","html":"ALS Paramedics spokesperson Garrith Jamieson said paramedics arrived on the scene to find that a Taxi carrying school kids home had T Boned a bakkie."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Jamieson said the cause of the accident is being investigated.","html":"Jamieson said the cause of the accident is being investigated."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Article: Caxton publication, The Citizen","html":"Article: Caxton publication, The Citizen"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Sad twist after motorist drove 100m off Chapman’s Peak cliff
